summary: Comprehensive testing of BidBlitz Penny Auction Platform - All features working correctly. Sidebar removed, timers updating, badges visible, legal pages with Dubai/Afrim Krasniqi info, mobile responsive with 2 columns.

homepage_loads.evidence: Homepage loads with data-testid='auctions-page', 77+ Live-Auktionen displayed

sidebar_removed.evidence: 'AUKTIONS-TYPEN' not visible on homepage - sidebar correctly removed for more auction space

timer_updates_every_second.evidence: Timer changed from 00:11:36 to 00:11:34 (2 seconds elapsed)

timer_shows_hourglass_when_ended.evidence: Code verified: if diff === 0, setDisplay('⏳') - shows hourglass when auction ends

login_functionality.evidence: Login with kunde@bidblitz.de / Kunde123! successful, redirected to /dashboard

bidding_functionality.evidence: Bid API endpoint /api/auctions/{id}/bid works, returns 200 with new_price

individual_auction_page.evidence: Clicking auction card navigates to /auctions/{id}, timer and JETZT BIETEN button visible

impressum.evidence: Dubai Silicon Oasis, Afrim Krasniqi CEO, BidBlitz FZCO all visible

agb.evidence: Dubai, Afrim Krasniqi, BidBlitz FZCO all visible

footer_dubai_info.evidence: Footer shows: Dubai Silicon Oasis, DDP Building A1, Dubai, VAE, +971 4 501 2345, info@bidblitz.ae, CEO: Afrim Krasniqi

mobile_responsiveness.evidence: Grid has 2 columns on mobile (390px width), grid-cols-2 class applied

critical_code_review_comments: LiveTimer component correctly uses setInterval with 1000ms interval for real-time updates
Timer shows ⏳ when auction ends (diff === 0) - waiting for restart
Sidebar removed from Auctions.js - full width layout for more auction space
All legal pages (Impressum, AGB, Datenschutz) correctly show Dubai/Afrim Krasniqi info
Footer correctly displays Dubai contact info and CEO name
Mobile responsive with grid-cols-2 for 2 columns on mobile devices
All German text correctly spelled - no misspellings found
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) Sidebar removed for more auction space, 2) Timer updates every second and shows ⏳ when ended, 3) All badges visible (-100%, VIP, 🌙 Nacht, 🎓 Anfänger, 🎁 Gratis), 4) Login/bidding works, 5) Legal pages show Dubai/Afrim Krasniqi info, 6) Footer has Dubai contact, 7) German spelling correct, 8) Mobile responsive with 2 columns, 9) No console errors.
